Wells Fargo
Black Enterprise · 2025 Report
Black Women Are The Fastest-Growing Group of Entrepreneurs — Up 13% in One Year
Between 2024 and 2025, Black women-owned employer businesses grew by 13% and revenue increased by nearly 6%, according to Wells Fargo's Impact of Women-Owned Businesses report.
Read on Black Enterprise
49%
Inc.
Inc. Magazine · 2025
Women Created Half of All New Businesses in 2024 — A Historic Milestone
Gusto's annual report found women launched 49% of all new companies in 2024, with Millennial and Gen Z women entering entrepreneurship at rates higher than their male counterparts.
